_comment: Feature freeze queue. New features are frozen for 3 days before processing. Managed by .github/workflows/process-features.yml

features.title: Unified chat + command window
features.description: Single input bar that handles both natural-language AI chat and shell commands. Removes separate wire stream panel.

features.title: Gemini connection LED in top bar
features.description: Status LED that shows whether the Gemini AI provider is connected, alongside the existing Docker/Ollama/Target LEDs.

features.title: Declutter UI — remove quick commands, wire panel, extra buttons
features.description: Remove quick-commands palette, live-wire panel, auto-pilot/live-pipe toggles, burn/notepad/report/export buttons. Simplify to core essentials.

features.title: Host details saved to DB (3-day retention)
features.description: hosts + host_ports tables at top of schema (processed first). Auto-parse nmap output and persist discovered hosts/ports. 3-day last_seen retention cleanup. API routes: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/hosts.
